auth_profile_mapping.note: sample requester_department_id labels are mapped to real department-scoped login identities. Meaningful supplemental calibration still requires the eval ACL seed to be applied to the active metadata store.

note: PROVISIONAL — threshold experiments only become meaningfully calibratable when retrieval requests run under department-scoped auth and the active metadata store has been ACL-seeded for eval. This run used mapped department auth profiles. Remaining blocker: apply eval ACL seed to the active metadata store.
